chapter_title.en: Chapter on What Has Been Reported Regarding One Who Kills and Then Flees

parts.text: رَوَى اَلْحَسَنُ بْنُ عَلِيِّ بْنِ فَضَّالٍ

text: اَلرَّجُلِ يُؤْخَذُ وَ عَلَيْهِ حُدُودٌ إِحْدَاهُنَّ اَلْقَتْلُ قَالَ "كَانَ عَلِيٌّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ يُقِيمُ عَلَيْهِ اَلْحُدُودَ قَبْلُ ثُمَّ يَقْتُلُهُ وَ لاَ تُخَالِفْ عَلِيّاً عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5380 - Al-Hasan ibn Ali ibn Faddal narrated from Ibn Bukayr, from Ubayd ibn Zurara, who narrated from Abu Abdullah (as) regarding a man who was apprehended with multiple legal punishments (hudud) upon him, one of which was execution.
Imam (as) said: "Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) used to carry out the other hudud first and then execute him. Do not oppose Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as)."
